response.justification: Bogdan has a strong engineering pedigree with Staff-level experience at Google and Senior experience at Meta, demonstrating his ability to work on high-scale distributed systems and AI-agent infrastructure. While he lacks explicit experience building dedicated experimentation and growth platforms as requested in the job description, his deep technical expertise, focus on engineering excellence, and proven leadership make him a highly viable candidate capable of adapting to the domain.
strengths: Extensive experience with high-scale distributed systems and high-availability features at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta, Dunnhumby).
Demonstrated experience with AI tooling, specifically contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Strong track record of technical leadership, promoting engineering excellence through TDD, CI/CD, and organizing engineering workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit experience designing and architecting core experimentation platforms (A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation).
No direct mention of growth-specific engineering, cross-surface funnels, or deep statistical analysis for metrics.
Timeline anomaly on the resume (Google employment listed as starting in April 2025) requires clarification during screening.
